vibe: GTA Vice City Aesthetic, Retrowave, 80s Miami, Gritty Synthwave

rules: Headlines MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Never use default 'Bold' for headers; rely on the natural weight of the display font.
Overlines and badges MUST be uppercase with wide spacing.
Apply subtle neon drop-shadow to main headings for the retrowave aesthetic.
Use neon pink (#FF00FF) and cyan (#00FFFF) for accents, glow effects, and interactive elements.
Text must maintain APCA contrast ratios.
Avoid large blocks of pure neon; use it as a 'tracing beam', border, or text glow.
Do NOT use pure #000000; stick to the deep void blue/black (#050510).

surfaces_and_effects.scanline_overlay: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 4px)

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid for Marketing sections (Hero), and MODE B: 'Control Room' for News Feeds
rules: Mobile-first responsive grids. Start with grid-cols-1.
Generous padding inside containers with borders (minimum p-6) to prevent text collision.
Use subgrid or h-full where necessary for consistent heights across adjacent cards.

components_strategy.buttons: Custom HTML/Tailwind for primary CTAs: dark background, neon border, cyan or pink text, and outer glow on hover.
components_strategy.badges: AI and Category badges should be pill-shaped, uppercase, space-mono, with a glowing 1px border. E.g., 'border-[#FF00FF] text-[#FF00FF]'.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (z-50) with PT-BR/EN language toggle and 'GTA 6' retrowave branding.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn Input/Textarea customized with deep dark backgrounds and cyan focus rings.
components_strategy.countdown_timer: Massive monospace numbers, cyan or pink glowing text, split into flex columns (Days, Hours, Mins, Secs).
components_strategy.ai_summary_section: Distinct block with 'tracing beam' gradient borders, showing the AI 'Resumo da Semana'.

image_handling: Hero background MUST use overlay 'bg-black/60' or a heavy gradient 'bg-gradient-to-t from-[#050510] to-transparent' to ensure text readability.
News card images should have a subtle brightness/contrast filter on hover.

hero_background.description: Retrowave 80s Miami synthwave sunset - Use for main hero header

weekly_summary_bg.description: Abstract retro 80s arcade neon grid - Use as background texture for the Weekly Summary/Newsletter section

news_placeholder_1.description: Miami street at night - Use for general/official news article thumbnails

news_placeholder_2.description: Glowing video game controller - Use for Leaks/Rumors article thumbnails

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme with neon pink (#FF00FF) and cyan (#00FFFF) accents.
Implement language context or toggle for PT-BR (primary) and EN.
The countdown timer target date is May 26, 2026. Use JavaScript to compute and animate the timer.
For the 'AI Summary / Resumo da Semana' section, render a distinct UI block with a gradient border or AI badge to emphasize machine generation.
Use Lucide-react or Phosphor icons, sizing them appropriately to match the retro aesthetic.
Ensure the layout is highly responsive. The news feed grid should switch from 1 column on mobile to 3 or 4 columns on large screens.
Inject a global VHS/grain overlay if possible using a fixed div with pointer-events-none and a low opacity CSS noise texture.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, links, and forms.
